title: aster aquifolius
intro: Aster aquifolius, also known as White Wood's Aster, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Aster aquifolius can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
